_meta.instructions: Review each entry. For 'confident': verify chosenId or set to null to skip. For ambiguous (PICK_ONE): set chosenId to the correct candidate id, or null to skip. 'no-match': leave for Phase D2. Then run: node scripts/importSeatracAccessibility.mjs apply
